caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSSES" and "HUSTLE" printed in gold lettering sits at a desk in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and a boom arm, speaking and gesturing with his right hand. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the "UNICORN HUSTLE" logo with five stars and a blue banner above that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug sits on the desk, decorated with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT". Small logos are visible on his hoodie and in the lower corners of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk, shifting his head slightly and moving his hand to emphasize his points while remaining seated in the same position.
